author: claude-code-noos (builder)

conflict.consequence_observed: GitHub cannot build the merge ref for a CONFLICTING PR, so ZERO pull_request workflows ran on PR #76 — the GEL CI gate silently never executed. (GEL CI itself is healthy: 91 historical pull_request runs, including on PR #72/#73 heads.)
conflict.root_cause: PR #76 was stacked on the PR #72 and PR #73 BRANCHES (built before they merged). Founder squash-merged #72 (9258b693, 08:21:37Z) and #73 (12a8cb79, 08:22:12Z); main then advanced further via #75 (MOTOR-WEB-001 RECEIPT_COMPLETE) and #77 (custody re-pin). The stacked branch's carried copies of #72/#73 history collided with main's evolved copies (e.g. motor/registry/jobs/MOTOR-WEB-001.json: branch carried #73's TRIAGE_REQUIRED version; main holds #75's RECEIPT_COMPLETE version).

resolution.method: RESTACK — fresh base from origin/main (a4bdf1f3) + cherry-pick of the single task commit 973da87d -> 3474e717. The duplicate #72/#73 branch history was discarded in favor of main's founder-merged truth; no conflicted file ever existed in the working tree.
resolution.skill_compliance: .cursor/skills/pr-conflict-resolver/SKILL.md + canonical SG skill loaded BEFORE touching the conflict. Classification: zero files with class receipt/registry/LOCKED were hand-resolved (git diff --diff-filter=U empty at every step). No --ours/--theirs used anywhere. The one semantically-superseded file (MOTOR-WEB-001.json) is resolved by NOT carrying any version of it — main's #75 version (RECEIPT_COMPLETE, founder-merged) is the registry truth and this PR no longer touches it.
resolution.overlap_check: The task commit's files (owner script, owner tests, route-map binding, registry README, MOTOR-RWREPAIR-001.json, receipts) have ZERO overlap with #75's files (MOTOR-WEB-001.json, registry invariant tests, receipts) and #77's files (authority pins, CLAUDE.md, doctor script).

verification.validate_py: python3 motor/registry/validate.py -> exit 0 (recipes: 5, jobs: 2 — MOTOR-RWREPAIR-001 coexists with #75's RECEIPT_COMPLETE MOTOR-WEB-001)
verification.conflict_gate: python3 scripts/verify_pr_conflict_resolution_v1.py --json -> ALL PASS (no markers, no unmerged paths, lock_status LOCKED)
verification.post_push_expectation: PR #76 flips to MERGEABLE and a gel-ci pull_request run appears on head 3474e717 — recorded in the PR comment after observation.

systemic_finding_disclosed: A CONFLICTING/DIRTY PR receives no pull_request CI at all and nothing surfaces that absence. Unless branch protection on main REQUIRES the GEL CI check (test-and-gate), a conflicting-then-hand-merged PR could reach main without the fail-closed gate ever running. Branch-protection state and the founder-decision note are recorded separately (settings changes are founder-gated).
not_claimed: No PASS/DONE verdict — builder output, SUBMITTED for independent verification
GEL CI green on PR #76 (expected post-push; verified and recorded in the PR thread, not pre-claimed here)
